items.title: Loading, empty, success and failure states: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this React: Component-Based Browser Applications misconception? An empty array during loading is equivalent to a confirmed empty result.

items.title: Loading, empty, success and failure states: verified implementation facet
items.prompt: Model remote data as explicit states rather than ambiguous null checks. Build a bounded artifact demonstrating explicit loading then success state; the locked browser verifier checks observable structure, behavior, or computed presentation.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted authoring draft. Runtime evidence does not replace independent human standards, pedagogy, accessibility, answer-oracle, and formal-exam review.

feedback.incorrect: At least one deterministic authoring check failed; inspect the exact artifact, interaction state, viewport, and observable result without assuming hidden-case details.
